name: SatPressFromTemp
cpp_unit: Real64 SatPressFromTemp(Real64 const T){ Real64 const Tk = T + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const lnP = -5800.2206/Tk + 1.3914993 - 0.04860239*Tk + 0.41764768e-4*pow_2(Tk) - 0.14452093e-7*pow_3(Tk) + 6.5459673*std::log(Tk); return std::exp(lnP); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(20.0)); printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(37.5)); printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(-10.0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(SatPressFromTemp(0.0))
    print(SatPressFromTemp(20.0))
    print(SatPressFromTemp(37.5))
    print(SatPressFromTemp(-10.0))

name: RadExchangeNet
cpp_unit: Real64 RadExchangeNet(Real64 const eps, Real64 const Ts, Real64 const Tsurr){ Real64 const Tsk = Ts + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const Tsurrk = Tsurr + Constant::Kelvin; return eps * Constant::StefanBoltzmann * (pow_4(Tsk) - pow_4(Tsurrk)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", RadExchangeNet(0.9, 30.0, 20.0)); printf("%.10g
", RadExchangeNet(0.85, 100.0, 25.0)); printf("%.10g
", RadExchangeNet(1.0, 0.0, 0.0)); return 0; }

name: MeanRadiantTemp
cpp_unit: Real64 MeanRadiantTemp(Real64 const T1, Real64 const A1, Real64 const T2, Real64 const A2){ Real64 const T1k = T1 + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const T2k = T2 + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const w = (A1*pow_4(T1k) + A2*pow_4(T2k))/(A1 + A2); return root_4(w) - Constant::Kelvin; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", MeanRadiantTemp(20.0, 5.0, 30.0, 5.0)); printf("%.10g\n", MeanRadiantTemp(18.0, 10.0, 24.0, 2.0)); return 0; }

name: MoistAirEnthalpy
cpp_unit: Real64 MoistAirEnthalpy(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const W){ return 1.00484e3*Tdb + W*(2.50094e6 + 1.85895e3*Tdb); }
mojo_unit:
def MoistAirEnthalpy(Tdb: Float64, W: Float64) -> Float64:
    return 1.00484e3*Tdb + W*(2.50094e6 + 1.85895e3*Tdb)
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", MoistAirEnthalpy(20.0, 0.008)); printf("%.10g
", MoistAirEnthalpy(30.0, 0.015)); printf("%.10g
", MoistAirEnthalpy(0.0, 0.0)); return 0; }

name: HumRatioFromVapPress
cpp_unit: Real64 HumRatioFromVapPress(Real64 const Pw, Real64 const Pb){ Real64 W = 0.62198*Pw/(Pb - Pw); if (W < 1.0e-5) W = 1.0e-5; return W; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", HumRatioFromVapPress(1200.0, 101325.0)); printf("%.10g
", HumRatioFromVapPress(3000.0, 101325.0)); printf("%.10g
", HumRatioFromVapPress(0.0, 101325.0)); return 0; }

name: MoistAirDensity
cpp_unit: Real64 MoistAirDensity(Real64 const Pb, Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const W){ Real64 const Tk = Tdb + Constant::Kelvin; return Pb/(287.055*Tk*(1.0 + 1.6077687*W)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", MoistAirDensity(101325.0, 20.0, 0.008)); printf("%.10g
", MoistAirDensity(101325.0, 35.0, 0.02)); printf("%.10g
", MoistAirDensity(95000.0, 0.0, 0.0)); return 0; }

name: MoistAirSpecificHeat
cpp_unit: Real64 MoistAirSpecificHeat(Real64 const W){ return 1.00484e3 + W*1.85895e3; }
mojo_unit:
def MoistAirSpecificHeat(W: Float64) -> Float64:
    return 1.00484e3 + W*1.85895e3
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", MoistAirSpecificHeat(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", MoistAirSpecificHeat(0.01)); printf("%.10g

name: DewPointFromVapPress
cpp_unit: Real64 DewPointFromVapPress(Real64 const Pw){ Real64 const lnPw = std::log(Pw/1000.0); Real64 Tdp; if (lnPw < 0.0) { Tdp = 6.09 + 12.608*lnPw + 0.4959*pow_2(lnPw); } else { Tdp = 6.54 + 14.526*lnPw + 0.7389*pow_2(lnPw) + 0.09486*pow_3(lnPw) + 0.4569*std::pow(Pw/1000.0, 0.1984); } return Tdp; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", DewPointFromVapPress(1200.0)); printf("%.10g
", DewPointFromVapPress(3500.0)); printf("%.10g
", DewPointFromVapPress(500.0)); return 0; }

name: LogMeanTempDiff
cpp_unit: Real64 LogMeanTempDiff(Real64 const dT1, Real64 const dT2){ if (std::abs(dT1 - dT2) < 1.0e-6) return 0.5*(dT1 + dT2); return (dT1 - dT2)/std::log(dT1/dT2); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", LogMeanTempDiff(10.0, 5.0)); printf("%.10g
", LogMeanTempDiff(20.0, 20.0)); printf("%.10g
", LogMeanTempDiff(40.0, 8.0)); return 0; }

name: NTUeffectivenessCounter
cpp_unit: Real64 NTUeffectivenessCounter(Real64 const NTU, Real64 const Cr){ if (Cr > 0.999) return NTU/(1.0 + NTU); Real64 const e = std::exp(-NTU*(1.0 - Cr)); return (1.0 - e)/(1.0 - Cr*e); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", NTUeffectivenessCounter(1.5, 0.5)); printf("%.10g
", NTUeffectivenessCounter(2.0, 1.0)); printf("%.10g
", NTUeffectivenessCounter(0.8, 0.25)); return 0; }

name: FinEfficiency
cpp_unit: Real64 FinEfficiency(Real64 const h, Real64 const k, Real64 const th, Real64 const L){ Real64 const m = std::sqrt(2.0*h/(k*th)); Real64 const mL = m*L; Real64 const e = std::exp(mL); Real64 const em = std::exp(-mL); Real64 const tanhmL = (e - em)/(e + em); return tanhmL/mL; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", FinEfficiency(50.0, 200.0, 0.002, 0.05)); printf("%.10g\n", FinEfficiency(25.0, 50.0, 0.001, 0.03)); return 0; }

name: NusseltDittusBoelter
cpp_unit: Real64 NusseltDittusBoelter(Real64 const Re, Real64 const Pr, bool const heating){ Real64 const n = heating ? 0.4 : 0.3; return 0.023*std::pow(Re, 0.8)*std::pow(Pr, n); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", NusseltDittusBoelter(10000.0, 0.7, true)); printf("%.10g
", NusseltDittusBoelter(50000.0, 4.0, false)); printf("%.10g
", NusseltDittusBoelter(20000.0, 1.0, true)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(NusseltDittusBoelter(10000.0, 0.7, True))
    print(NusseltDittusBoelter(50000.0, 4.0, False))
    print(NusseltDittusBoelter(20000.0, 1.0, True))

name: SkyTempClark
cpp_unit: Real64 SkyTempClark(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const Tdp, Real64 const opaqueFrac){ Real64 const Tk = Tdb + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const emiss = (0.787 + 0.764*std::log((Tdp + Constant::Kelvin)/273.0))*(1.0 + 0.0224*opaqueFrac); return std::pow(emiss, 0.25)*Tk - Constant::Kelvin; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", SkyTempClark(20.0, 12.0, 0.5)); printf("%.10g
", SkyTempClark(5.0, 2.0, 1.0)); printf("%.10g
", SkyTempClark(30.0, 18.0, 0.0)); return 0; }

name: GroundTempSeasonalPoly
cpp_unit: Real64 GroundTempSeasonalPoly(Real64 const Tmean, Real64 const Tamp, Real64 const dayOfYear){ Real64 const f = mod(dayOfYear - 1.0, 365.0)/365.0; Real64 const shape = -16.0*pow_2(f)*pow_2(1.0 - f); return Tmean + Tamp*shape; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", GroundTempSeasonalPoly(12.0, 8.0, 200.0)); printf("%.10g
", GroundTempSeasonalPoly(15.0, 5.0, 1.0)); printf("%.10g
", GroundTempSeasonalPoly(12.0, 8.0, 183.0)); return 0; }

name: HeatingDegreeDays
cpp_unit: Real64 HeatingDegreeDays(Real64 const Tbase, Real64 const Tavg){ Real64 const dd = Tbase - Tavg; return 0.5*(dd + std::abs(dd)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", HeatingDegreeDays(18.0, 10.0)); printf("%.10g
", HeatingDegreeDays(18.0, 22.0)); printf("%.10g
", HeatingDegreeDays(18.0, 18.0)); return 0; }

name: WetBulbApproxPoly
cpp_unit: Real64 WetBulbApproxPoly(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const RH){ Real64 const r = RH/100.0; Real64 Twb = Tdb - (1.0 - r)*(0.55 + 0.007*Tdb)*(14.0 + 0.5*Tdb); if (Twb > Tdb) Twb = Tdb; return Twb; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", WetBulbApproxPoly(25.0, 50.0)); printf("%.10g
", WetBulbApproxPoly(30.0, 70.0)); printf("%.10g
", WetBulbApproxPoly(15.0, 100.0)); return 0; }

name: ThermalResistanceSeries
cpp_unit: Real64 ThermalResistanceSeries(Real64 const Rsi, Real64 const Lins, Real64 const kins, Real64 const Rso){ Real64 const Rtot = Rsi + Lins/kins + Rso; return 1.0/Rtot; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", ThermalResistanceSeries(0.13, 0.1, 0.04, 0.04)); printf("%.10g\n", ThermalResistanceSeries(0.13, 0.2, 0.035, 0.04)); return 0; }

name: SolarHourAngle
cpp_unit: Real64 SolarHourAngle(Real64 const localHour){ Real64 const h = mod(localHour + 12.0, 24.0) - 12.0; return 15.0*h*Constant::DegToRad; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", SolarHourAngle(13.5)); printf("%.10g
", SolarHourAngle(6.0)); printf("%.10g
", SolarHourAngle(25.0)); return 0; }

name: PMVThermalLoad
cpp_unit: Real64 PMVThermalLoad(Real64 const M, Real64 const Tcl, Real64 const Tr, Real64 const Ta){ Real64 const Tclk = Tcl + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const Trk = Tr + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const rad = 3.96e-8*(pow_4(Tclk) - pow_4(Trk)); Real64 const conv = 12.1*std::sqrt(0.1)*(Tcl - Ta); return (0.303*std::exp(-0.036*M) + 0.028)*(M - rad - conv); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", PMVThermalLoad(58.15, 28.0, 22.0, 24.0)); printf("%.10g\n", PMVThermalLoad(70.0, 30.0, 25.0, 26.0)); return 0; }

name: EnthalpyDiffClamp
cpp_unit:
Real64 MoistAirEnth2(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const W){ return 1.00484e3*Tdb + W*(2.50094e6 + 1.85895e3*Tdb); }
Real64 EnthalpyDiffClamp(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const W){ Real64 h = MoistAirEnth2(Tdb, W); if (h < 0.0) h = 0.0; if (h > 1.0e5) h = 1.0e5; return h; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", EnthalpyDiffClamp(20.0, 0.008)); printf("%.10g
", EnthalpyDiffClamp(-50.0, 0.0)); printf("%.10g
", EnthalpyDiffClamp(40.0, 0.05)); return 0; }

name: RhoCpProduct
cpp_unit: Real64 RhoCpProduct(Real64 const Tdb){ Real64 const Tk = Tdb + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const rho = 101325.0/(287.055*Tk); Real64 const cp = 1004.84; return rho*cp; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", RhoCpProduct(20.0)); printf("%.10g
", RhoCpProduct(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", RhoCpProduct(35.0)); return 0; }

name: SignedHeatFlux
cpp_unit: Real64 SignedHeatFlux(Real64 const U, Real64 const Tin, Real64 const Tout){ Real64 const dT = Tin - Tout; Real64 const q = U*std::abs(dT); return sign(q, dT); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", SignedHeatFlux(2.5, 22.0, 5.0)); printf("%.10g
", SignedHeatFlux(2.5, 5.0, 22.0)); printf("%.10g
", SignedHeatFlux(2.5, 10.0, 10.0)); return 0; }
